description: Two-column layout wrapper for undergraduate course detail pages, with a sidebar navigation column (4 units wide) and a main content column (8 units wide).

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard two-column course layout with sidebar and main content

notes: Pure two-column layout container for UG course detail pages. The left column uses Foundation grid class 'columns large-4' and the right uses 'columns large-8'. The root element also carries the Foundation 'row' class. Inner content is entirely Drupal-generated and varies per course — both columns accept arbitrary ReactNode children via 'sidebar' and 'children' props respectively.
